name: DeepBot
description: DeepBot is a unified crypto trading platform built around Telegram, web, and a self‑custodial wallet. DeepBot Trader delivers fast, MEV‑protected trading and portfolio tools, while DeepBot Wallet lets you safely trade across chains without switching wallets. DeepBot LINK brings everything to a clean web dashboard. The ecosystem is powered by a token and revenue‑share model that redistributes platform fees to holders, and it now includes Bobby Buy Bot, the leading Telegram buy‑alert bot, giving DeepBot projects and traders built‑in exposure in thousands of groups.
